bits.premise: Dayton, Ohio's reputation is so bleak that the crowd's muted reaction to hearing you live there implies you must not be interested in heroin.
Proximity to violent crime creates irrationally cheap rent, which in turn creates a financial incentive to commit even more murders.

lines.text: - What's up? What's up, man?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm happy to be here in Texas, man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I actually live in a spot called Dayton, Ohio.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Yup, yup, and that's all it gets right there.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's it. That's it now for real, man.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: People don't get too hype when I say I live in Dayton,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: man, it always gets real weird and awkward and quiet, you know?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I get it, man.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I must not be a big fan of a heroin, I see.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: 'Cause that's all we got in Southern Ohio, baby.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: All we got is heroin and fat white women.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's it, that's it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Hey, hey, but hold on.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'ma dip it to both.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Okay, no, stop it, stop.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: You laughing at the truth, stop it, stop it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: People are like, "Drel, why don't you move outta Dayton?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "You so talented, man, you should move,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "but I won't 'cause the rent's too low, man, so cheap.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My crib right now is $217 per month.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Now, the week before I got it, I found out
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that a triple homicide happened right around the corner,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: which explained a lot.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But when I found that out, that shit had me thinking about
lines.label: setup

lines.text: killing four people just to get that rent down to $150.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: [cheers and applause]
lines.label: fluff
